chosen_action.title: Repair StackOverflow answer specificity and refresh the best live-ready packet

why_this_action.summary: The best executable move was to improve the highest-intent unsaturated lane still available right now: a 0-answer StackOverflow question about autonomous AI workflow reliability. The prior draft was too generic, so the lane itself needed repair before reuse.

verification: Refreshed answer is now question-specific for the fintech production-reliability case
Latest handoff packet was rewritten with the refreshed answer and explicit placement status
blocking_factors: No authenticated StackOverflow posting surface is configured in this runtime, so direct live posting could not be completed here
expected_outcome: A stronger live-ready answer asset for a real 0-answer demand-capture opportunity and better future StackOverflow answer quality.

measurement_window.success_metric: Live placement or reuse of this answer spine on a real demand-capture surface.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If the packet is still unplaced by the next review window, stop refreshing the same StackOverflow packet and choose a different executable high-intent lane.
